# AGENTS.md — Audio Transcode Watcher

## Project Overview

Automated multi-format audio transcoding service with real-time file watching and lyrics fetching.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/audio-transcode-watcher](https://github.com/GeiserX/audio-transcode-watcher)
- **Language:** Python
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
